# iproute Provider

The iproute provider manages Linux networking resources using netlink. It supports all resource types from iproute2 including links, addresses, routes, rules, neighbors, and more.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Default namespace
provider "iproute" {}

# Specific network namespace
provider "iproute" {
  alias     = "isolated"
  namespace = "my-namespace"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `namespace` (String) Network namespace to operate in. If not set, operates in the default namespace.
